prompt: generate a realistic Taiwan receipt (統一發票) from a night market bubble tea stand called '珍珠奶茶王' (Pearl Milk Tea King). The receipt shows the distinctive 8-digit random number 'AB-12345678' at the top for the lottery system, followed by items in Traditional Chinese: 珍珠奶茶 (Pearl Milk Tea) - NT$65, 雞排 (Fried Chicken) - NT$80, 鹽酥雞 (Popcorn Chicken) - NT$60. The receipt includes the store's unified business number, address in Taipei, and shows 總計 (Total): NT$205 with 5% 營業稅 (business tax) listed separately. The thermal-printed receipt is slightly faded and has grease stains from the fried food, lying on a red plastic table with Taiwan Beer bottles in the background. The receipt paper has the characteristic yellowish tint and the store chop/stamp mark is visible.
prompt_refined:
Generate a photorealistic image of a realistic Taiwan unified invoice (統一發票) from a night market bubble tea stand called '珍珠奶茶王' (Pearl Milk Tea King). The thermal-printed receipt, characterized by a yellowish tint, is slightly faded and shows grease stains from fried food. It lies flat on a red plastic table, with Taiwan Beer bottles subtly blurred in the background.

The receipt's content is in Traditional Chinese. At the very top, the distinctive 8-digit lottery number 'AB-12345678' is visible. The store's unified business number and its address in Taipei are clearly printed. A store chop/stamp mark is visible on the paper.

The itemized purchases include: 珍珠奶茶 (Pearl Milk Tea) - NT$65, 雞排 (Fried Chicken) - NT$80, and 鹽酥雞 (Popcorn Chicken) - NT$60. The receipt displays a '總計 (Total): NT$205' with '5% 營業稅 (business tax)' explicitly listed as a separate line item.
objects: Taiwan unified invoice (統一發票) with yellowish tint
Blurred Taiwan Beer bottles in the background
"珍珠奶茶王" (Pearl Milk Tea King) store name on invoice
Traditional Chinese receipt text including itemized purchases (珍珠奶茶, 雞排, 鹽酥雞), total (NT$205), and 5% business tax
Store's unified business number and Taipei address on invoice
